What We Help You Achieve

Your goals are unique.
Your plan should be too.

Whether you're planning for retirement, your child's education, or simply building a financial cushion — we map every goal to the right strategy.

01

Financial Freedom

Build sustainable, long-term wealth that gives you choices — not just savings.

Talk to us
02

Retirement Planning

Start early or catch up — we help you build a retirement corpus that lasts.

Talk to us
03

Children's Future

Education, marriage, or a head start in life — plan today for what matters most tomorrow.

Talk to us
04

Emergency Fund

Life is unpredictable. We help you build a liquid buffer so setbacks stay manageable.

Talk to us
05

Goal-Based Planning

Every goal gets its own strategy — the right fund, timeline, and SIP amount to match.

Talk to us
How It Works

From conversation to confident investing

A simple, four-step process designed around you — not paperwork.

01

Tell Us Your Goals

We start with a genuine conversation — understanding your financial situation, priorities, timeline, and concerns.

02

We Map Your Plan

Together, we build a personalised strategy — the right funds, the right allocation, the right SIP for your goals.

03

You Start Investing

Once you're comfortable with the plan, we guide you through a smooth, paperless onboarding process.

04

We Stay With You

Your plan is reviewed regularly and updated as your life and the markets evolve. We are in it for the long run.

Why Choose Us

What makes Zenith Blazee different

No Conflict of Interest

We're your distributor, not the fund house. Your long-term returns matter more to us than product margins.

CA-Backed Planning

Every plan has Dhaval's financial rigour built in. Decisions are grounded in numbers, not guesswork.

People-First Approach

Annkkur's hospitality background means you'll always feel heard, respected, and genuinely understood.

Long-Term Commitment

We don't just start plans — we stay invested in seeing them through. No one-time transactions here.

Insurance Advisory

Protection First.
Always.

Alongside mutual fund planning, we help you evaluate the right life and health insurance coverage — because a strong financial plan begins with the right protection in place.

Life Insurance

Ensure your family is protected no matter what happens.

Health Insurance

Protect your savings from unexpected medical expenses.

FAQ

Questions we hear
all the time

If you don't find what you're looking for, just reach out — we're happy to talk.

Ask Us Anything

A mutual fund distributor is an AMFI-registered professional who helps investors select, purchase, and manage mutual fund investments. Unlike banks or apps, a distributor provides personalised guidance — not a one-size-fits-all portfolio. Zenith Blazee is registered under ARN-334080.

Banks and apps offer standardised products with little personalisation. At Zenith Blazee, we take time to understand your specific goals and build a plan around them. We are accessible, accountable, and stay with you through the journey — not just at the point of sale.

No. Mutual funds can be started with as little as ₹500 per month through a SIP (Systematic Investment Plan). We will help you find the right starting point based on your income, goals, and timeline.

Goal-based planning means every investment is linked to a specific objective — your child's education, your retirement, or your financial freedom. Instead of investing generically, we map each goal to the right fund category, timeline, and SIP amount.

All mutual fund investments carry market risk, and past performance does not guarantee future returns. However, with the right diversification, time horizon, and planning, risk can be managed significantly. We always ensure you understand what you are investing in before you commit.

We offer advisory on life and health insurance — helping you understand what coverage you need and how it fits into your overall financial plan. We do not sell specific insurance products or earn commissions on insurance. Our focus is purely on helping you make informed decisions.

Meet the Partners

The people behind your plan

Two professionals with very different backgrounds, united by one commitment: helping you get where you want to go.

AB

Annkkur Bandhu

Partner

15+ years in luxury hospitality (Taj, Oberoi, Fairmont, Vantara). Annkkur brings a deeply people-first approach — he is the first point of connection for most clients.

DP

Dhaval Pitkar

Partner, CA

Chartered Accountant with Big 4 and startup experience. Dhaval brings financial depth to every plan — ensuring every recommendation is grounded in solid fundamentals.
